Rich traditional coverage extending up the forearm. Perfect for your wedding day.

Intricate floral & geometric patterns across the feet with lotus centrepiece.

Elegant lotus motif centrepiece with detailed lace-like border. A true showstopper.

Lotus Minimal

Delicate scattered lotus buds with decorated fingertips — modern & understated.

Patchwork Full Hand

Bold geometric sections with fine floral and spiral motifs — contemporary & striking.

Full Hand

Lotus & Lattice

Diagonal lattice base with twin lotus motifs and a decorative wrist cuff. Stunning detail.

Bridal · Palm

Glowing mandala centrepiece with scalloped border — radiant and deeply traditional.

Full Hand

Crescent & Swirls

Half-moon swirl design with layered texture and spiral florals. Rich and dramatic.

✦ Packages ✦

Our Services

Tailored to every occasion — DM us to discuss

🌸

Simple Design

One hand, minimal to moderate pattern. Great for casual events & everyday occasions.

🌺

Party Package

Both hands with Arabic, Indo-Western or traditional patterns. Perfect for Eid & birthdays.

👰

Bridal Full Set

Both hands & feet with heavy bridal coverage. Custom motifs including names & dates.

🎉

Event Hire

Available for weddings, festivals & corporate events. Multiple guests welcome.
